member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerDirectory
member.summary: Provides access to members that enumerate through ServerDirectories.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerDirectory.Count
member.summary: The number of ServerDirectories in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerDirectory.Next
member.summary: Returns the next ServerDirectory in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerDirectory.Reset
member.summary: Starts the enumeration at the beginning.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerDirectoryInfo
member.summary: Provides access to members that enumerate through ServerDirectoryInfos.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerDirectoryInfo.Count
member.summary: The number of ServerDirectoryInfos in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerDirectoryInfo.Next
member.summary: Returns the next ServerDirectoryInfo in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerDirectoryInfo.Reset
member.summary: Starts the enumeration at the beginning.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerMachine
member.summary: Provides access to members that enumerate through ServerMachines.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerMachine.Count
member.summary: The number of ServerMachines in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerMachine.Next
member.summary: Returns the next ServerMachine in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerMachine.Reset
member.summary: Starts the enumeration at the beginning.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerObjectConfiguration
member.summary: Provides access to members that enumerate through ServerObjectConfigurations.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerObjectConfiguration.Count
member.summary: The number of configurations in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerObjectConfiguration.Next
member.summary: Returns the next configuration in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerObjectConfiguration.Reset
member.summary: Starts the enumeration at the beginning.

member.summary: Provides access to members that enumerate through ServerObjectConfigurationInfos.

member.summary: The number of ServerObjectConfigurationInfos in the enumeration.

member.summary: Returns the next ServerObjectConfigurationInfo in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerObjectConfigurationInfo.Reset
member.summary: Starts the enumeration at the beginning.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerObjectExtensionType
member.summary: Provides access to members that enumerate through the registered server object extension types.

member.summary: The number of extension types in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerObjectExtensionType.Next
member.summary: Returns the next extension type in the enumeration.

member.summary: Provides access to members that enumerate through the registered server object extension types.

member.summary: The number of extension types in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerObjectExtensionTypeInfo.Next
member.summary: Returns the next extension type in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerObjectExtensionTypeInfo.Reset
member.summary: Starts the enumeration at the beginning.

member.summary: Provides access to members that enumerate through ServerObjectTypes.

member.summary: The number of types in the enumeration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IEnumServerObjectType.Next
member.summary: Returns the next type in the enumeration.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IGISServerConnection
member.summary: Provides access to members that connect to a GIS server.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IGISServerConnection.Connect(System.String)
member.summary: Connects to the GIS server specified by the machineName.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IGISServerConnection.ServerObjectAdmin
member.summary: The server object admin for the connected GIS server.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IGISServerConnection.ServerObjectManager
member.summary: The server object manager for the connected GIS server.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IGISServerConnection2
member.summary: Provides access to methods that connect a specified user to an ArcGIS server.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IGISServerConnection2.Connect2(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Connects the user specified by userInfo to the GIS server given by machineName.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServer
member.summary: Provides access to members that connect to a GIS server.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServer.ServerObjectAdmin
member.summary: Gets the server object admin for the connected GIS server.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServer.ServerObjectManager
member.summary: Gets the server object manager for the connected GIS server.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServer2
member.summary: Provides access to methods that connect a specified user to an ArcGIS server.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServer2.ServerObjectManager2(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the server objcet manager of the connected ArcGIS server for the user specified by userInfo.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerContext
member.summary: Provides access to members for managing a server context, and the objects running within that server context.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerContext.CreateObject(System.String)
member.summary: Create an object in the server context whose type is specified by the CLSID.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerContext.GetObject(System.String)
member.summary: Get a reference to an object in the server context's object dictionary by its Name.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerContext.LoadObject(System.String)
member.summary: Create an object in the server context from a string that was created by saving an object using SaveObject.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerContext.ReleaseContext
member.summary: Release the server context back to the server so it can be used by another client (if pooled), or so it can be destroyed (if non-pooled).

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerContext.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Remove an object from the server context's object dictionary.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerContext.RemoveAll
member.summary: Remove all objects from the server context's object dictionary.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerContext.SaveObject(System.Object)
member.summary: Save an object in the server context to a string.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerContext.ServerObject
member.summary: The map or geocode server object running in the server context.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerContext.SetObject(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Add an object running in the server context to the context's object dictionary.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectory
member.summary: Provides access to members that control the behavior and properties of a server directory to administrators.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectory.CleaningMode
member.summary: The mode by which the files in the server directory are cleaned (by age, by size or none).

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectory.Description
member.summary: The description of the server directory.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectory.MaxFileAge
member.summary: The maximum age (in seconds) a file can be in the server directory before it is deleted, if the cleaning mode is by file age.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectory.Path
member.summary: The path of the server directory.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectory.URL
member.summary: The URL of the virtual directory that maps to the physical directory as described by the Path property.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectoryInfo
member.summary: Provides access to properties of a server directory.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectoryInfo.CleaningMode
member.summary: The mode by which the files in the server directory are cleaned (by age, by size or none).

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectoryInfo.Description
member.summary: The description of the server directory.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectoryInfo.MaxFileAge
member.summary: The maximum age (in seconds) a file can be in the server directory before it is deleted, if the cleaning mode is by file age.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectoryInfo.Path
member.summary: The path of the output directory.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectoryInfo.URL
member.summary: The URL of the virtual directory that maps to the physical directory as described by the Path property.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectoryInfo2
member.summary: Provides access to properties of a server directory.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerDirectoryInfo2.Type
member.summary: The Type of server directory.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerEnvironmentEx
member.summary: Provides access to Server configuration information.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerEnvironmentEx.GetServerDirectoryInfos
member.summary: An enumerator over all the GIS server's ServerDirectoryInfos.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerLog
member.summary: Provides access to members that query and retrieve log records.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerLog.CreateQuery
member.summary: Creates an IServerLogQuery for interrogating the ArcGIS server logs.
Retrieves ArcGIS Server log records using an IServerLogQuery.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerLogQuery
member.summary: Provides access to members that configure a query to the ArcGIS Server logs.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerLogQuery.EndTime
member.summary: The end time in the ArcGIS Server logs at which to end the query.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerLogQuery.Level
member.summary: The log level at which to query (1-5).

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerLogQuery.Machine
member.summary: The machine name for which to query.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerLogQuery.MaxRecords
member.summary: The maximum number of records to retrieve with the query.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerLogQuery.StartIndex
member.summary: The starting index at which to start retrieving records from the query.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerLogQuery.StartTime
member.summary: The start time in the ArcGIS Server logs at which to begin the query.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerLogQuery.Target
member.summary: The log target name.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerMachine
member.summary: Provides access to properties of a server host machine for administrators.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerMachine.Description
member.summary: The description of the host machine.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerMachine.Name
member.summary: The name of the machine that can host server objects for the GIS server.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObject
member.summary: Provides access to properties of a map or geocode server object.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObject.ConfigurationName
member.summary: Name of the server object configuration that defines the server object.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObject.TypeName
member.summary: Type of the server object (MapServer or GeocodeServer).

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin
member.summary: Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.
Adds a server object configuration (created with CreateConfiguration) to the GIS server.
Adds a host machine (created with CreateMachine) to the GIS server.
Adds a server directory (created with CreateServerDirectory) to the GIS server.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.CreateConfiguration
member.summary: Creates a new server object configuration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.CreateMachine
member.summary: Creates a new host machine.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.CreateServerDirectory
member.summary: Creates a new server directory.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.DeleteConfiguration(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a server object configuration from the GIS server.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.DeleteMachine(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a host machine from the GIS server, making it unavailable to host server objects.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.DeleteServerDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a server directory such that its cleanup is no longer managed by the GIS server. It does not delete the physical directory from disk.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.GetConfiguration(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get the server object configuration with the specified Name and TypeName.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.GetConfigurations
member.summary: An enumerator over all the server object configurations.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.GetConfigurationStatus(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get the configuration status for a server object configuration with the specified Name and TypeName.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.GetMachine(System.String)
member.summary: Get the host machine with the specified Name.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.GetMachines
member.summary: An enumerator over all the GIS server's host machines.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.GetServerDirectories
member.summary: An enumerator over the GIS server's output directories.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.GetServerDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Get the server directory with the specified Path.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.GetTypes
member.summary: An enumerator over all the server object types.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.PauseConfiguration(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Makes the configuration unavailable to clients for processing requests, but does not shut down running instances of server objects, or interrupt requests in progress.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.Properties
member.summary: The properties for the GIS server.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.StartConfiguration(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Starts a server object configuration and makes it available to clients for processing requests.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin.StopConfiguration(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Stops a server object configuration and shuts down any running instances of server objects defined by the configuration.
Updates the properties of a server object configuration.
Updates the properties of a host machine.
Updates the properties of a server directory.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2
member.summary: Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.
Registers a new server object extension type with the server object type indicated in the argument list.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.CreateExtensionType
member.summary: Creates a new empty server object extension type.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.CreateFolder(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a server configuration folder.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.DeleteExtensionType(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Unregisters a server object extension type from the server object type indicated in the argument list.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.DeleteFolder(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a server configuration folder.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.Disable
member.summary: Disables a started SOM.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.Enable
member.summary: Enables a disabled SOM.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.FolderInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Properties associated with a server configuration folder.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.GetConfigurationsEx(System.String)
member.summary: An enumerator over all the server object configurations in a server configuration folder.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.GetExtensionTypes(System.String)
member.summary: An enumerator over all the server object extension types.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.GetFolders(System.String)
member.summary: An array of folder names in the server configuration folder.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.RenameFolder(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Renames a server configuration folder.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.ServerLog
member.summary: Retrieves a reference to the ArcGIS Server logs.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin2.ValidateConfiguration(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates server object configuration.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin3
member.summary: Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin3.GetConfigurationsEx2(System.String,ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriConfigurationStatus)
member.summary: An enumerator over all the server object configurations in a server configuration folder.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin4
member.summary: Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin4.IsSecurityEnabled
member.summary: Indicates whether security is switched on or off.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin5
member.summary: Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin5.GetConfigurationProperties(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves properties of server object configuration.
Updates properties of server object configuration.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin6
member.summary: Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin6.GetInputDir(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the input directory for the given Server Object Configuration.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin6.IsInputDirInUse
member.summary: Checks if at least one service is currently using the input directory

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin6.UploadData(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Uploads data to server and saves it as a file in the input directory of the given configuration.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin7
member.summary: Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin7.IsAdminUser(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if given user is a member of agsadmin group.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin8
member.summary: Provides access to members that administer the ArcGIS server.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin8.AddGeodatabase(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add Geodatabase.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin8.DeleteGeodatabase(System.String)
member.summary: Delete Geodatabase.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin8.Geodatabases
member.summary: Get Geodatabases.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin8.GetGeodatabase(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Get Geodatabase.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectAdmin8.PutGeodatabase(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Put Geodatabase.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration
member.summary: Provides access to administrators to members that control the behavior and properties of a server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.Description
member.summary: Description of the server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.IsolationLevel
member.summary: The isolation level of the server objects defined by the server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.IsPooled
member.summary: Indicates whether the server objects defined by this configuration are pooled.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.MaxInstances
member.summary: The maximum number of server object instances for a server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.MinInstances
member.summary: The minimum number of server object instances for a server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.Name
member.summary: Name of the server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.Properties
member.summary: Initialization parameters and properties for the server objects created by the server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.RecycleProperties
member.summary: The recycling properties for the server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.StartupType
member.summary: The startup type for this server object configuration. Startup type describes whether the server object configuration is started when the server object manager service is started for the GIS server.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.TypeName
member.summary: Type of the server object configuration (MapServer or GeocodeServer).

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.UsageTimeout
member.summary: Maximum time (in seconds) a client can hold onto an instance of a server object for this server object configuration before releasing it back to the server. It is the maximum time allowed between calling CreateServerContext and ReleaseServerContext.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfiguration.WaitTimeout
member.summary: Maximum time (in seconds) a client will wait for an instance of a server object for this server object configuration using the CreateServerContext method on IServerObjectManager before timing out.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfigurationInfo
member.summary: Provides access to properties of a server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfigurationInfo.Description
member.summary: Description of the server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfigurationInfo.IsPooled
member.summary: Indicates whether the server objects defined by this configuration are pooled.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfigurationInfo.Name
member.summary: Name of the server object configuration.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfigurationInfo.TypeName
member.summary: Type of the server object configuration (MapServer or GeocodeServer).

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfigurationStatus
member.summary: Provides access to properties of a server object configuration's status to administrators.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfigurationStatus.InstanceCount
member.summary: Number of instances of server objects for a particular configuration that are currently running in the GIS server.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfigurationStatus.InstanceInUseCount
member.summary: Number of running instances of server objects for a particular configuration that are in currently use by clients of the GIS server.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectConfigurationStatus.Status
member.summary: Status of the server object configuration. This status indicates whether the server object configuration is started, stopped, paused, etc.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtension
member.summary: Provides access to the members that control a server object extension.
Initializes and starts the server object specified by the IServerObjectHelper reference.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtension.Shutdown
member.summary: Stops the server object specified by the IServerObjectHelper reference.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtensionManager
member.summary: Provides access to members that help locate installed server object extensions.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtensionManager.FindExtensionByCLSID(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a server object extension found using a string representation of its class ID.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtensionManager.FindExtensionByTypeName(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a server object extension found using its type name.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtensionType
member.summary: Provides access to properties, for administrators, of a server object extension type.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtensionType.CLSID
member.summary: The class ID of the extension type.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtensionType.Description
member.summary: The description of the extension type.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtensionType.Name
member.summary: The name of the extension type.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtensionTypeInfo
member.summary: Provides access to the properties of a server object extentsion type.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtensionTypeInfo.Description
member.summary: The description of the extension type.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectExtensionTypeInfo.Name
member.summary: The name of the extension type.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectHelper
member.summary: Provides access to a holder for a reference to a server object.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectHelper.ServerObject
member.summary: Reference to a server object.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectHelper2
member.summary: Provides access to a holder for a reference to a server object.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectHelper2.ServerObjectProperty
member.summary: Server object property.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager
member.summary: Provides access to properties and members of the ArcGIS server's server object manager.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager.CreateServerContext(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a reference to a server context. The server context can be based on a specified server object configuration, or can be an empty server context if no server object configuration is specified.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager.GetConfigurationInfo(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the ServerObjectConfigurationInfo for the specified Name and TypeName.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager.GetConfigurationInfos
member.summary: An enumerator over all the GIS server's ServerObjectConfigurationInfos.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager.GetServerDirectoryInfos
member.summary: An enumerator over all the GIS server's ServerDirectoryInfos.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager.GetTypeInfos
member.summary: An enumerator over all the GIS server's ServerObjectTypeInfos.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager2
member.summary: Provides access to properties and members of the ArcGIS server's server object manager for server object extensions.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager2.FolderInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Properties associated with a server configuration folder.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager2.GetConfigurationInfosEx(System.String)
member.summary: An enumerator over all the ArcGIS server's ServerObjectExtensionInfos in a given folder.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager2.GetConfigurationStatus(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get the configuration status for a server object configuration with the specified Name and TypeName.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager2.GetExtensionTypeInfos(System.String)
member.summary: An enumerator over all the ArcGIS server's ServerObjectExtensionTypeInfos.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager2.GetFolders(System.String)
member.summary: An array of folder names in the server configuration folder.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager2.SystemInfo
member.summary: The properties of the underlying system hardware and software.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager3
member.summary: Provides access to properties and members of the ArcGIS server's server object manager for server object extensions.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager3.GetConfigurationInfosEx2(System.String,ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriConfigurationStatus)
member.summary: An enumerator over the ArcGIS server's ServerObjectExtensionInfos in a given folder.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager4
member.summary: Provides access to properties and members of the ArcGIS server's server object manager.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectManager4.CreateServiceCatalog
member.summary: Gets the ServiceCatalog for the services running on the server.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectType
member.summary: Provides access to methods, for administrators, that control the behavior and properties of a server object type.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectType.CLSID
member.summary: The GUID of the COM class corresponding to the server object type.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectType.Description
member.summary: Description of the server object type.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectType.Name
member.summary: Name of the server object type.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectTypeInfo
member.summary: Provides access to properties of a server object type.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectTypeInfo.Description
member.summary: Description of the server object type.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServerObjectTypeInfo.Name
member.summary: Name of the server object type.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceCatalog
member.summary: Provides access to properties of an ArcGIS Server web service catalog.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceCatalog.ServiceDescriptions
member.summary: An array of the web service descriptions in the web service catalog.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceCatalog2
member.summary: Provides access to properties of an ArcGIS Server web service catalog.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceCatalog2.GetFolders(System.String)
member.summary: Gets an IStringArray of service folder names.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceCatalog2.MessageFormats
member.summary: The message formats supported by the web services in the catalog.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceCatalog2.MessageVersion
member.summary: The message version this server version supports.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceCatalog2.ServiceDescriptionsEx(System.String)
member.summary: An array of the web service descriptions in the web service catalog.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceCatalog3
member.summary: Provides access to properties of an ArcGIS Server web service catalog.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceCatalog3.RequiresTokens
member.summary: Indicates whether the service catalog requires tokens for authentication.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceCatalog3.TokenServiceURL
member.summary: Token service url.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceDescription
member.summary: Provides access to members that control the properties of an ArcGIS Server web service description.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceDescription.Name
member.summary: The name of the web service.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceDescription.Type
member.summary: The type of the web service (MapServer or GeocodeServer).

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceDescription.URL
member.summary: The URL of the web service.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceDescriptionArray
member.summary: Provides access to members that control the contents of web services description array.
Add an element to the array.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceDescriptionArray.Count
member.summary: The number of items in the array.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceDescriptionArray.Element(System.Int32)
member.summary: The Element at the specified index.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceDescriptionArray.Element(System.Int32)
member.summary: The Element at the specified index.
Insert an element into the array.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceDescriptionArray.Remove(System.Int32)
member.summary: Remove an element from the array.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.IServiceDescriptionArray.RemoveAll
member.summary: Remove all elements from the array.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.GISServerConnection
member.summary: The ServerConnection object for connecting to the GIS server and getting the ServerObjectManager and ServerObjectAdmin.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriConfigurationStatus
member.summary: Server object configuration status.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriConfigurationStatus.esriCSStarted
member.summary: 0: The server object configuration is started.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriConfigurationStatus.esriCSPaused
member.summary: 1: The server object configuration is paused.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriConfigurationStatus.esriCSStopped
member.summary: 2: The server object configuration is stopped.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriConfigurationStatus.esriCSStarting
member.summary: 3: The server object configuration is starting.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriConfigurationStatus.esriCSStopping
member.summary: 4: The server object configuration is stopping.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriConfigurationStatus.esriCSDeleted
member.summary: 5: The server object configuration being deleted.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryCleaningMode
member.summary: The server directory cleaning mode.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryCleaningMode.esriSDCNone
member.summary: 0: Files in the directory are not deleted by the GIS server.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryCleaningMode.esriSDCSliding
member.summary: 1: Files in the directory are cleaned by the GIS server based on the amount of time elapsed since they were last modified.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryCleaningMode.esriSDCAbsolute
member.summary: 2: Files in the directory are cleaned by the GIS server based on the amount of time elapsed since they were created.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType
member.summary: Server directory type.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType.esriSDTypeOutput
member.summary: 0: Output server directory.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType.esriSDTypeCache
member.summary: 1: Cache server directory.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType.esriSDTypeJobs
member.summary: 2: Jobs server directory.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType.esriSDTypeIndex
member.summary: 3: Index server directory.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType.esriSDTypeInput
member.summary: 4: Input server directory.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType.esriSDTypeSystem
member.summary: 5: System server directory.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType.esriSDTypeUploads
member.summary: 6: Uploads server directory.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType.esriSDTypeKML
member.summary: 7: KML server directory.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType.esriSDTypeJobRegistry
member.summary: 8: Job Registry server directory.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerDirectoryType.esriSDTypeUnknown
member.summary: 9: Unknown server directory.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerIsolationLevel
member.summary: The server object configuration isolation level.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerIsolationLevel.esriServerIsolationHigh
member.summary: 0: High isolation. Each server object instance runs in its own process.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerIsolationLevel.esriServerIsolationLow
member.summary: 1: Low isolation. Multiple server object instances may run in the same process.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServerIsolationLevel.esriServerIsolationAny
member.summary: 2: Low or High isolation.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServiceCatalogMessageFormat
member.summary: The message formats supported by a web service catalog.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServiceCatalogMessageFormat.esriServiceCatalogMessageFormatSoap
member.summary: 1: The catalog supports messages carrying SOAP payloads.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServiceCatalogMessageFormat.esriServiceCatalogMessageFormatBin
member.summary: 2: The catalog supports messages carrying binary payloads.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriServiceCatalogMessageFormat.esriServiceCatalogMessageFormatSoapOrBin
member.summary: 3: The catalog supports messages carrying SOAP or binary payloads.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriStartupType
member.summary: The startup type for a server object configuration.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriStartupType.esriSTAutomatic
member.summary: 0: The server object configuration starts automatically when the server object manager starts.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.Server.esriStartupType.esriSTManual
member.summary: 1: The server object configuration does not start automatically when the server object manager starts. The configuration must be started manually.
